name: Reaper necklace
hoverSummary: Stacking hit-chance necklace that builds a reaper buff on successful hits.
detailLines: Examine: When wearing this necklace each hit will grant a stacking reaper buff. Each stack gives a 0.1% attack bonus in all styles, capping at 30 stacks.
Core ingredient for the Essence of Finality amulet.
Important future comparison point for ranged amulet choices.
